notes:
Milestone after part 3/9 (dialogue-panel) audit-passed. Director armed TWO decoupled parts in parallel (zero shared files):

PART 4 -- calendar-actions (RESEARCH -> PLAN -> BUILD -> TEST; AUDIT auto). PRIORITY of this batch: it consumes the audit-passed cheffyCalendar.ts engine (extractCookingEvents/buildIcs/googleCalendarUrl/deriveWeekStart) and registers a generate-ics handler + Google Calendar link into the part-3 action-dispatch registry (window.registerCheffyAction). It also ESTABLISHES the registration-mount pattern -- HOW a part's handler script gets onto the page WITHOUT touching CheffyPanel.astro, and HOW per-week CookingEvents reach the handler at runtime while <Cheffy /> is NOT yet mounted in Layout. That pattern is the precondition for parts 5 (local-notifications / trigger-permission) and 6 (checklist-export-import / export-checklist), which are DELIBERATELY HELD this milestone: all three register against the same untouched-panel seam, so fanning them out before the mount pattern exists risks collision on the mount point. Call sites for the data island: index.astro (FOOD-OF-THE-WEEK.md), weekend.astro (WEEKEND.md), archive/[slug].astro (filename prop). Boundary: no engine changes unless a real bug; do NOT mount Cheffy in Layout (part 9); do NOT touch sw.js / GroceryList.astro / notifications / checklist; MAY use the #cheffy processing hook during generation.

PART 8 -- animated-readme-svg (PLAN -> BUILD -> TEST; AUDIT auto; RESEARCH intentionally skipped -- mascot SVG + expression groups already exist in Cheffy.astro from part 2, SMIL is a settled standard, no external unknowns). Fully independent: only src/assets/cheffy-animated.svg + README.md, zero code coupling with part 4 -- runs in parallel safely.

REMAINING after this batch: local-notifications (5), checklist-export-import (6) -- next milestone, sequenced behind the part-4 mount pattern; reduced-motion (7) -- cross-cutting CSS sweep, best after all interactive surfaces land; pe-build-gate (9) -- final wiring of <Cheffy /> into Layout + npm run build gate, must be LAST. No test framework by design: ephemeral Node scripts + npm run build (astro check && astro build) are the durable gate. Open standing gate on CALLBOARD (DOM smoke harness) still UNANSWERED -- proceeding as-is; do not duplicate it.
